Weak sourcing: all four Quellen are secondary sources (PTAheute, medizinrecht-blog.de, BIV-OT, Gelbe Liste). No direct SGB V paragraph or official gematik/BMG/KBV source cited. The compliance deadlines are critical facts that warrant a primary source.
articles.fixInstructions: Add a primary source to Quellen: the relevant SGB V paragraph (§ 360 SGB V for E-Rezept-Pflicht) at https://www.gesetze-im-internet.de/sgb_5/__360.html, or a KBV or gematik page on the electronic Hilfsmittelverordnung. This is a minor issue that does not affect the verdict but reduces source reliability.

issues: Legislative timeline accuracy: article states 'Das KHVVG wurde im Oktober 2024 beschlossen'. The Bundestag vote was 17 October 2024, but the Bundesrat passed it 22 November 2024 and it entered into force 12 December 2024. Saying 'Oktober 2024 beschlossen' refers only to the Bundestag stage, which is technically correct but misleading — the law was fully enacted in December 2024.

Number of Leistungsgruppen: article consistently states 65. However, the KHAG (Krankenhausreformanpassungsgesetz) proceedings are expected to reduce this to 61. This is an ongoing legislative development that the article does not mention, which may become stale.
articles.fixInstructions: 1. Update the legislative description in Überblick: change 'Das KHVVG wurde im Oktober 2024 beschlossen' to 'Der Bundestag beschloss das KHVVG am 17. Oktober 2024, der Bundesrat billigte es am 22. November 2024; das Gesetz trat am 12. Dezember 2024 in Kraft.' 2. Add a note about KHAG: 'Laut KHAG-Entwurf (Krankenhausreformanpassungsgesetz, Stand 2025/2026) ist eine Reduzierung von 65 auf 61 Leistungsgruppen geplant.' This prevents the article from becoming stale if KHAG passes.
